texto: With each day, each hour and every moment of life, no matter how small, I realize that I have found a way of bringing me straight to the one person that I would give everything for… to you. I am living in a dream, in a dream I don’t want to awake from.
explicacao: Citação de Sawm Rad sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “With each day, each hour and every moment of life, no matter how small, I realize that I have fou…” articula vida, love, passion em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como love e passion.
